text.title: EU Sovereign LLM Deployment Bundle Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when eu-sovereign-llm-deployment-bundle is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Provider says 'EU region' but ships logs to a US central log bucket.
antipattern.note: Fix: Demand sub-processor list + log-destination in contract; verify with traceroute / egress test.

antipattern.reason: Schema not pinned at inference time.
antipattern.note: Fix: Enforce schema at gateway; reject calls lacking required attributes.

antipattern.description: Risk classification done once at launch, never updated.
antipattern.note: Fix: Wire risk re-classification into change-management; ML team + DPO co-sign.
